title: The Emotional Hazards of Being Considerate

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a fun day out, I ask Mejiro Palmer if there's
anywhere else she'd like to go before we head
back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: How about we switch things up today and go somewhere you wanna go, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You're always busy, so I think a little break would
do you some good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's how we end up strolling around town, but
we don't get far before...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Gasp! They opened up a new golf shop here! Wooow, that driver looks like it can really let 'em fly!
choice_data_list: Want to go in?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nah, it's fine. I can check it out another time.
We're in the middle of a walk right now, after all!
choice_data_list: (Huh?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Usually, she'd jump on the offer and fly right into
the shop, but something feels off about her
today. Her weird behavior continues too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Which movie do I wanna watch? Honestly, the
whole line-up looks super interesting, so
whichever one you pick!
choice_data_list:
Then how about we watch the featured film of
the month?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Let's see... Oh, that'll be Brain-Bending Art Labyrinths ! Always nice to try something new!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: W-whoaaa... U-ummm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They weren't kidding about the "brain-bending"
part. Most of the movie went over my head. It was
probably meant for art buffs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Whew! What a flick! It was just so... So fancy!
choice_data_list: "Fancy" is one way to put it.
"Fancy" is one way to put it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
For sure! The visuals sure packed a punch! Stuff
always leaves so much bigger an impact when it's
blown up on the silver screen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Is something bothering me? Hm... Now that you
mention it...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I've been getting a lot of sliced shots during golf
lately, but that's about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
How about you? Anything weighing you down
recently? I'd be happy to lend you an ear,
whatever it is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every time I try to ask her what's wrong, she
dodges the question and turns it back to me.
Eventually, we wrap up our day out.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Welp! Here we are at my dorm. Today flew by,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the fun day! Did you enjoy it too?
choice_data_list: I did, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Looks like something's troubling you big
time. Well, come on, then! I'm here to listen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm all ears to whatever you might be worrying
about!
choice_data_list: Did you really have fun today?
Did you really have fun today?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I did! Nothing makes me happier than
seeing you enjoying yourself!
choice_data_list: It's the same for me.
It's the same for me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Um... I don't get what you're trying to say.
choice_data_list: Did you really enjoy yourself?
Did you really enjoy yourself?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yep, sure did! Or I guess, I feel more relieved
than anything 'cause I didn't cause you any
trouble!
choice_data_list: What? You never cause me any trouble!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No, but like, I do! And I did! Remember the other
day?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You were planning to take care of some work, but
you dropped everything just to help me sell all
that milk.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That wasn't the only time, either. You're always
putting my wants and needs ahead of yourself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy and grateful that you've always got my
back, for real! But like...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I don't want you to keep prioritizing me if it
means neglecting your own wants and needs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
So... yeah! That's why I decided to be more
careful about that from now on!
choice_data_list: Palmer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I guess you already saw right through me, though,
huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I was really trying to act natural and stuff, but
your sixth sense is, like, no joke!
choice_data_list: You don't need to worry about me.
You don't need to worry about me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: Supporting you is what I live for.
Supporting you is what I live for.
Let's just carry on as we always have.
Let's just carry on as we always have.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: Supporting you is what I live for.
Supporting you is what I live for.
Let's just carry on as we always have.
Let's just carry on as we always have.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oh... Yeah, I gotcha. I mean, even when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wait, hold the phone. What did you say just now?
choice_data_list: What, "Supporting you is what I live for"?
What, "Supporting you is what I live for"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that! Do you realize what you just said?
choice_data_list: Realize... what, exactly?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Man, you're so oblivious sometimes! Not
that that's a bad thing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, I'm gonna head back now! See you
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch Mejiro Palmer jog back to her dorm, I
can only hope she understood what I was trying
to say.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Yeah, we were both acting mad sus today,
weren't we?
choice_data_list: I think we should just be ourselves.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'm there with you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
No more walking on eggshells! You be you and I'll
be me. Now lemme hear you say, "Waheeey!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the Mejiro Palmer I know is back. What a
relief.
